summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ASR Solar CRM new admin features - Iteration 8. All 17 backend tests passed (100%), all frontend features working correctly. Features tested: Mark as Paid (CRM Payments), Edit/Delete Leads (Leads Management), Agent Registration form, Solar Calculator with ASR branding, Govt Schemes page, and Google Review button.

issues: Shows 'No news available at the moment' - needs admin to add content via AI refresh or manual entry

critical_code_review_comments: Mark as Paid endpoint correctly updates payment_status and syncs with CRM leads
Edit/Delete leads sync correctly between leads and crm_leads collections
Agent Registration form has proper KYC fields (Aadhar, PAN) and bank details
Google Review button correctly links to https://share.google/HWt7y6fPM2DbAZ085
Solar Calculator has ASR branding and modern UI
All new routes properly added to App.js (/calculator, /govt-schemes, /become-agent)
seed_data_creation: Created test leads (TEST_EditDelete_Lead, TEST_AdminEdit_Lead, TEST_AdminDelete_Lead, TEST_Payment_User, TEST_MarkPaid_User), test agent (AGT1119)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features are working. Mark as Paid button visible in CRM > Payments tab. Edit/Delete buttons with proper data-testid attributes in Leads Management. Agent Registration form at /become-agent works end-to-end. Google Review button links correctly. Solar Calculator has ASR branding. Govt Schemes page needs content - admin can use 'AI Updates' button or manually add news.

mark_as_paid.details: Mark Paid button visible for pending registrations. Updates payment_status to 'paid' and syncs with CRM leads.

edit_delete_leads.details: 15 Edit buttons and 15 Delete buttons found with data-testid attributes. Edit updates both leads and crm_leads collections. Delete removes from both collections.

agent_registration.details: Form includes Personal Details (name, phone, email, district, address), KYC Details (Aadhar, PAN), Bank Details (name, account, IFSC), and Experience. Form submission creates agent with unique ID (e.g., AGT1119).

google_review_button.details: Button with data-testid='google-review-btn' links to https://share.google/HWt7y6fPM2DbAZ085

solar_calculator.details: ASR Solar Calculator with branding, PM Surya Ghar Partner badge, modern UI. Calculates recommended capacity, estimated cost, savings, and subsidy info.

govt_schemes_page.details: Page loads correctly with title 'Government News & Schemes'. Shows 'No news available' - admin needs to add content via Govt News Management.

navigation.details: Navigation includes Calculator, Govt Schemes links. Both desktop and mobile menus have correct links.
